name: Neovim
description: A feature to install the Neovim text-editor

install_method.description: Installation method: 'ppa' adds a PPA repository, 'source' builds from git, 'apt' installs from default Ubuntu repositories

version.description: Git tag to build from when install_method is 'source' (e.g. 'stable', 'v0.9.5', 'master')

ppa.description: PPA to add when install_method is 'ppa'
